evidence_refs.source_quote: B46 Limited to become B46 Select Bus Service (SBS) Spring 2016

tool_args.label: Off-Board Fare Payment Description
tool_args.raw_text: B46 SBS riders must dip their MetroCards or use coins to get a ticket to ride before boarding the bus. The cost is the same as a Limited bus, Local bus or the subway. Transfers are stored on the MetroCard.

payload.claim_text: B46 SBS riders must dip their MetroCards or use coins to get a ticket to ride before boarding the bus. The cost is the same as a Limited bus, Local bus or the subway. Transfers are stored on the MetroCard. If paying by coins, show the ticket to the bus operator to get a paper transfer MetroCard. Riders then board the bus at any door, greatly reducing wait times at bus stops.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46 SBS riders must dip their MetroCards or use coins to get a ticket to ride before boarding the bus. The cost is the same as a Limited bus, Local bus or the subway. Transfers are stored on the MetroCard. If paying by coins, show the ticket to the bus operator to get a paper transfer MetroCard. Riders then board the bus at any door, greatly reducing wait times at bus stops.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Community Engagement Process
tool_args.raw_text: Community engagement timeline including meetings with Community Boards, CAC Meetings, Public Workshops, and Public Open Houses

payload.claim_text: Community engagement process included: Meetings with Community Boards, neighborhood groups, and elected officials to discuss 2014 bus lane project; CAC Meeting and Public Workshop to introduce SBS project and identify key issues; Meetings with Community Boards and a Public Open House to discuss proposed service plan and introduce design concepts; Community Board meetings to present and refine detailed street design and capital improvements; Community meetings to discuss construction schedules

tool_args.label: Off-Board Fare Payment Description
tool_args.raw_text: B46 SBS riders must dip their MetroCards or use coins to get a ticket to ride before boarding the bus. The cost is the same as a Limited bus, Local bus or the subway.

payload.claim_text: B46 SBS riders must dip their MetroCards or use coins to get a ticket to ride before boarding the bus. The cost is the same as a Limited bus, Local bus or the subway. Transfers are stored on the MetroCard. If paying by coins, show the ticket to the bus operator to get a paper transfer MetroCard. Riders then board the bus at any door, greatly reducing wait times at bus stops.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46 SBS riders must dip their MetroCards or use coins to get a ticket to ride before boarding the bus.
